title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: A weekly tech news discussion covering warning signs in the AI boom, including excessive token consumption, low productization rates (only 18% of tokens spent on shipped products), and circular investment dynamics. Also discusses Anthropic's valuation overtaking OpenAI, Robinhood's AI trading integration, and privacy concerns around AI service integrations.
